Comment.value: Turns self into a random skeleton
Turns self into a random skeleton
Statue - Gargoyle (Living) - This gargoyle statue will turn into a gargoyle if 'players' come near it.
Statue - Gargoyle (Living) - This gargoyle statue will turn into a gargoyle if 'players' come near it.

For use with CEP crafting system.
Will be spawned and erased dynamically as needed, or can be placed in an inaccessible area.

This is a waypoint that can be placed in an area to mark a spot that should be visited by NPCs (to give random walking around some direction). 

This will affect the animations and behavior of NPCs using the PlayAmbientAnimations functions (see the OnSpawn script nw_c2_default9 and the library x0_i0_anims for details). 

Note that this feature will only work in modules that use the XP1 modified AI.

This is the default waypoint you may place to set a patrol path for a creature or NPC.
1. Create the creature and either use its current Tag or fill in a new one.
2. Place or make sure the WalkWayPoints() is within the body of the On Spawn script for the creature.
3. Place a series of waypoints along the route you wish the creature to walk.
4. Select all of the newly created waypoints and right click. Choose the Create Set option.
5. The waypoint set will have a set name of "WP_" + NPC Tag. Thus if an NPC with the Tag "Guard" will have a waypoint set called "WP_Guard". Note that Tags are case sensitive.
